completed: Bulk Import System (Students, Faculty, Electives, Mentors)
pending: End-to-end load testing for bulk imports

decisions.decision: Emails are triggered asynchronously without awaiting the full SMTP response per row to prevent HTTP request timeouts during large imports.
decisions.trade_offs: Failed email deliveries must be monitored via the logger as the HTTP response only confirms the database update.

decisions.decision: Switched from a poll-based model to SSE for lower latency and better student UX during the clearance process.
decisions.trade_offs: Increased open connection count on the server; mitigated by using lightweight SSE over WebSockets.
Refactored axiosInstance to rely on httpOnly cookies and production response envelopes.
Aligned AuthContext with /api/auth/me and demo bypass logic.
Standardized student API service and resolved component import paths.
Implemented mobile-first responsive UI in PageWrapper and Table components.
Optimized Login, Student Status, and Faculty/HOD dashboards for mobile viewports.

pending: Backend API alignment (if required as a follow-up)
Admin portal responsiveness refactor (explicitly excluded from current scope)

decisions.decision: Preserved the full API envelope {success, data, pagination} in the Axios interceptor.
decisions.trade_offs: Requires components to access '.data' property, but enables consistent metadata/pagination access across the app.

decisions.decision: Removed localStorage token persistence in favor of browser-managed cookies.
decisions.trade_offs: Improved security (XSS mitigation) at the cost of requiring 'withCredentials: true' on all cross-origin requests.
